today.title: GDC Weekly Sync
today.synopsis: Weekly cross-functional sync with Colin Brannigan (SVP, GDC Core) and GDC leadership team. Regular cadence covering product, platform, and team updates across the sprint.
discussion_topics: Sprint board status — GDCU-8814 (News Sitemaps, High) completed; GDCU-8792 (Cloudflare Bot Management, High) and GDCU-8803 (Sign-in Modal Redesign) moved to In QA
Design system progress — Ciara working on Claude Design integration (GDCU-8893); Colin asked to see WIP prototype on 17 Apr
GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign blocked — awaiting Michael Butlin feedback since 15 Apr; Michael is on today's attendee list
GDCU-8824 Cosmo Spins Bloomreach flag — dedicated 12:00 BST sync today with CRM team to unblock
today.prep_notes: Colin asked Ciara to send design system WIP on 17 Apr — Ciara pushed back noting only 3 days on it and 3000+ components to refactor. Confirm status before the call and set expectations if not yet sent. Vic Dadson is on sick leave today so analytics updates will be limited. Michael Butlin attends this meeting — good opportunity to chase GDCU-8619 blocker directly. Gabriel Cornoiu restructured PDMT meeting (now planning every 3 weeks); acknowledge if it comes up.

today.title: Project (Personal Focus Block)
today.synopsis: Mike's own focus block. Note: partially overlaps with the Bloomreach sync (12:00-12:30 BST) — external meeting takes priority.
today.prep_notes: Calendar conflict: Bloomreach flags meeting (12:00-12:30 BST) falls within this block. Treat 12:00-12:30 as the Bloomreach call.

today.title: Flags on Bloomreach for FTP Games
today.synopsis: Sync to determine what Bloomreach can support for the Cosmo Spins end-of-game push notification flag (GDCU-8824), blocked since 20 Apr pending CRM/Bloomreach capability confirmation.
discussion_topics: GDCU-8824 open questions: can Bloomreach reset the flag on their side? Should the trigger be a property or event?
Shaun Cronin scope question (raised 16 Apr): should a similar flag fire at end of slot tournament spins to cross-sell Cosmo Spins?
Delivery timeline — Chloe committed to next delivery cycle (by end of week) pending this clarification
today.prep_notes: GDCU-8824 is currently Blocked/Backlog with no assignee. Key open questions for CRM (Shaun Cronin / Simon Merner): (1) Can Bloomreach reset the flag on their side? (2) Property vs event? Come prepared to unblock immediately post-call and assign the ticket. Note Vic Dadson was asked to create a GA tracking ticket for this on 16 Apr — may be outstanding given her sick day; follow up separately.

today.title: GDCU Assemble Standup
today.synopsis: Daily GDCU Assemble pod standup. All four direct reports (Vic Dadson, Jessica Dordevic, Ciara Carroll, Miguel Migneco) are in the invite, though Vic is on sick leave today.
discussion_topics: Sprint blockers — GDCU-8619 (Operator List) blocked on Michael Butlin, GDCU-8824 (Cosmo Spins flag) outcome from today's 12:00 meeting
Design system status — GDCU-8893 (Ciara) and DS component additions (Jessica working on branch)
Global Strategy Hub prototype — Miguel posted updated prototype in #gdc-product-led-growth yesterday (GDCU-8799/8823); 'Jump to' UX concern needs resolution
GDCU-8548 Cosmo Spins sign-in HOTFIX — In Product, awaiting sign-off
today.prep_notes: Vic likely absent (sick — doctor appointment today). Note: Mike has half-day annual leave from 13:00 BST flagged in HiBob — confirm attendance at 14:30 standup. Gabriel Cornoiu also attends; useful to align on his PDMT meeting restructure announcement from yesterday.

action_items.action: Chase Michael Butlin for feedback on GDCU-8619 (Operator List Redesign) — blocked since 15 Apr. He attends GDC Weekly Sync at 10:00 — raise directly there.
Attend Bloomreach sync at 12:00 BST prepared with GDCU-8824 key questions: property vs event trigger, Bloomreach reset capability, slot tournament flag scope
Confirm whether Ciara has sent design system WIP to Colin Brannigan (requested 17 Apr) — Ciara flagged timeline pressure; manage expectations before GDC Weekly Sync
Review Miguel Migneco's Global Strategy Hub prototype posted in #gdc-product-led-growth (20 Apr) — provide feedback on 'Jump to' design concern to unblock GDCU-8823
Check in with Vic Dadson post-doctor appointment — she mentioned possible short sign-off; ensure sick leave is logged in HiBob and plan analytics cover if extended
Follow up with Paddy on GitHub Orion access request for Ciara's Claude Design system project (GDCU-8893) — Mike requested on 20 Apr, pending approval
Assign GDCU-8834 (Implement Fixes for Cool Tones Update) — ticket created 20 Apr, currently unassigned
Chase Vic Dadson to create GA tracking ticket for Cosmo Spins flag (requested by Chloe on GDCU-8824, 16 Apr) — pending given sick day
Acknowledge Gabriel Cornoiu's PDMT meeting restructure — new cadence announced 20 Apr: planning every 3 weeks, weekly team check-in otherwise
